questions.prompt: What short title captures this idea?
questions.guidance: Use a concise operator-facing title. Detailed scoring and WBS authoring belong in later states.

questions.prompt: Summarize the idea in one or two sentences before brainstorming begins.
questions.guidance: Capture intent and desired outcome only — do not draft plan sections or run scoring here.

questions.prompt: Is the idea ready to enter brainstorming?
questions.guidance: No active agent scoring session runs in idea state. When ready, transition to brainstorming and run start-brainstorm-session.
